hynix_16g_m_die.notes: Hynix 16Gb desktop UDIMM calibration; observed peak tends to be much lower than Samsung at similar tuned voltages.

hynix_16g_a_die.notes: Hynix A-die/M-die are calibrated below 4 W per 16GB DIMM around 1.40 V.

hynix_24g_m_die.notes: Higher-capacity Hynix modules get capacity scaling but stay below Samsung heat calibration.

samsung_16g_early.notes: Early Samsung DDR5 is less efficient than Hynix but should not be treated as 8 W at low-voltage XMP.

notes: Heat is classified from one DIMM, not total kit watts.
Timings are not used because their power effect is small compared with voltage, die, capacity, and module design.
